hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/fariaghani/Downloads/taxagent && echo '--- Pre-commit: TypeScript ---' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 && echo '--- Pre-commit: Tests ---' && npm run test:run 2>&1 | tail -15 && echo '--- Pre-commit: Lint ---' && npx next lint --max-warnings 0 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
cd /Users/fariaghani/Downloads/taxagent && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E '^src.*error TS' | head -10
